channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd May
item.description:
Yet again more fly tipping round the close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dandridge Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light mid alligned, 22nd May
item.description:
Street points to the back of my house in the neighbouring steet. Not pointed onto the pavement on llyton Avenue .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lytton Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 22nd May
item.description:
We have founded today and it has started to smell.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on rubbish bin, 22nd May
item.description:
Graffiti on rubbish bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supermarket trolleys dumped., 22nd May
item.description:
There is now 3 supermarket trolleys at the end on Tilbrook road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridgebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obliterated sign., 22nd May
item.description:
Presumed deliberate vandalism to sign on lamp post as it is in a very high difficult to reach place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54,56, Onslow Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This street is in a disgusting state, 22nd May
item.description:
There are multiple piles of rubbish and flytips on Edgehill - the council just appear to ignore. Please can the flytips along this road be cleared and enforcement action taken to prevent reoccurrence.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edge Hill, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous of garbage bags in the building, 22nd May
item.description:
I live in Vanbrugh house, Loddgies Road E9 7NP There is three bags of garbage at the entrance of the building and on the fourth floor there’s six bags of garbage with pizza box on top of it. This is very concerning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Loddiges Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bed and two mattresses, 22nd May
item.description:
Flytipped bed and mattresses on Duchy Street opposite the school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting not working outside 31 Cowles, 22nd May
item.description:
The street lighting outside number 31 is not working although other lampposts in the street are.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowles, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard wtc on Seal Street E8, 22nd May
item.description:
Hello, please remove the cardboard etc on Seal Street E8 at Shacklewell Lane. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Cabinet, 22nd May
item.description:
Graffiti on Cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 340, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poison Hemlock growing next to public path, 22nd May
item.description:
I noticed 2 lots both to the left of 2 different lamp posts. On right hand side of the path walking away from the monument at top of Martin's Hill. Easy to see if you know what your looking for. Needs to be dealt with as sap toxic and it's on edge of path used by kids enroute yo school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Naval Walk, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on road, 22nd May
item.description:
Dead fox near the bus stop on top of a Red Hill in Chislehurst.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint bucket left at bus stop, 22nd May
item.description:
Broken paint bucket with lots of spillage left at the bus stop right on top of Red Hill in Chislehurst.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree supports broken, 22nd May
item.description:
The tree outside number 44 is no longer supported. Both supports are lying on the ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside no 32 Alleyn Rd not working (number 20/08). Street light outside no 41 (approx) also not working (number (20/11), 22nd May
item.description:
With two lights out, this stretch of the road is very dark. It's not good for security or for anyone walking home so I hope they can be mended quickly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on street, 22nd May
item.description:
Flytipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oven dumped, 22nd May
item.description:
In Ruddstreet car park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Four car tires fly tipped, 22nd May
item.description:
A stack of four car tires have been dumped behind the bus stop at the end of Heathfield Road next to the dustbin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
